title: Lights
why_this_song: Lights by Ellie Goulding (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 42 times; first heard in: "You show the lights that stop me turn to stone"
Appears 18 times; first heard in: "'Cause they're calling, calling, calling me home"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "'Cause they're calling, calling, calling me home"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Light, lights, lights, lights"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You show the lights that stop me turn to stone"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You shine it when I'm alone
And so I tell myself that I'll be strong
'Cause they're calling, calling, calling me home

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lights" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lights" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "calling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "calling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Lights" was released in 2010. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Lights" foi lançada em 2010. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Lights" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Lights" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
